title: Sharjah announces traffic diversions near University city for Etihad rail works; Motorists face delays until August
summary_full: Sharjah motorists face temporary traffic diversions near University City until August due to construction for the Etihad Rail Station Access Roads Project. Authorities urge drivers to follow new signs and allow extra travel time, especially during peak hours. These essential upgrades are paving the way for faster, sustainable passenger rail services connecting the UAE's key areas, promising long-term transport benefits for residents.
